title: Crumble Tarts
description: Sweet and crumbly tarts with a hint of earthy undertones, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and cut into small squares.
Place a small spoonful of the earthy mushroom jam onto one half of each square.
Fold the other half over the jam and press the edges to seal.
In a small bowl, mix together the crumble topping and coconut sugar (if using).
Sprinkle the crumble mixture over the pastry tarts.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm, dust with vanilla extract and flaky sea salt (if using).
